checkingLead: Please wait while we validate your invitation link.
secureLead: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of protection. You can enable it now or set it up later in Settings.
credentialsLead: Set up your admin account for {email}.
mfaLead: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
backupLead: Store these codes somewhere safe. Each code works once if you lose your device.
passwordHelper: At least 8 characters with letters and numbers.
backupAck: I have saved these backup codes in a secure place
fixFields: Fix the highlighted fields before continuing.
enterTotp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
missingParams: Invite link is missing required parameters.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most 72 characters.
validation.passwordNeedsNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
validation.passwordNeedsLetter: Password must contain at least one letter.
validation.passwordWeak: Password is too weak. Use a mix of letters and numbers and avoid common patterns.
validation.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid mobile number in E.164 format (e.g. +38970123456).

errors.validateDefault: Invite link is invalid or expired.
errors.credentialsDefault: Could not continue. Check your details and try again.
errors.locked: Too many failed attempts. Ask a super admin to resend the invite.
errors.revoked: This invite was revoked. Contact your administrator for a new one.
errors.alreadyAccepted: This invite has already been used. Sign in with your account instead.
errors.expired: This invite link is invalid or has expired.
errors.notPending: This invite is no longer valid.
errors.invalidTotp: Invalid code. Check your authenticator app and try again.
errors.mfaRequired: Complete two-factor setup before accepting the invite.
errors.emailRegistered: An account with this email already exists.
errors.phoneInUse: This phone number is already registered to another account.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.badRequest: Please check your input and try again.

toast.accountReadyMessage: Save your backup codes, then continue to the dashboard.
toast.skipSuccessMessage: Your account is ready. You can enable two-factor authentication anytime in Settings.
